scripts.demo: concurrently -k -n vite,sim -c blue,magenta "vite --port 5173 --strictPort" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node node_modules/@evenrealities/evenhub-simulator/bin/index.js http://localhost:5173"
scripts.qr: evenhub qr --url http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'):5173
